entries.name: escalation-manager
entries.intent: Defines escalation paths, SLA thresholds, and notification sequences for stalled workflows. Invoke when configuring automatic escalation for queues, setting up SLA breach alerts, or designing management dashboards for workflow health.

entries.name: rule-designer
entries.intent: Writes routing rules and conditional business logic for workflow automation. Invoke when translating business policy documents, underwriting guidelines, or compliance requirements into executable routing conditions and decision trees.

entries.name: workflow-architect
entries.intent: Designs end-to-end approval workflows from business requirements. Invoke when the user needs to architect a complete workflow from intake to completion, including approval levels, routing, escalations, and notifications for insurance, mortgage, or financial services processes.
